def positive_method_mutates_state_and_emits_user_facing_representation():
    rule_id = "method_mutates_state_and_emits_user_facing_representation"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag methods that both change internal state and format user-facing output."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
